description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times and inflicts Electrocute. Enemies afflicted with Electrocute are stunned for [3 sec->2sec].

For [5 sec->6 sec], restores HP every [sec->6sec]. The caster [cannot perform other actions->gains immunity to CC] while the skill is active, but [all allies take 60% reduced Magic DMG->Kaulah takes 50% reduced All DMG].
For [15 sec->7sec], increases the ATK of all allies, Attack Speed by [350->42%], and Critical Rate by [350->150].

Every 15sec, deals Magic DMG to 4 enemy, inflicts Electrocute for 20sec, and stuns the target for [1 sec->0.6sec] on a Critical Hit. Damage taken is reduced by 15% per enemy afflicted with Electrocute, stacking up to 3 times. Electrocute: Deals DoT equal to 25% ATK every 1sec for 20sec.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [25%->10%] for 10 sec.

light.unified: You are immune to status ailments while casting.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and each heal additionally restores 5% of the target's Max HP.

light.unified: Restores [1 orb of->1000] Mana to all allies.

description.unified: [Swift Wind] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, and additionally increases Crit DMG by {0}%.

dark.unified: When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by [300->200%] and their Mana by [200->100] per sec for 5 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 5 sec.

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a [{0}%->30%] chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by [{2}%->{1}%] for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for [2 sec->0.5 sec].

Summons the soul of Blue Wind, Coventina, recovering [2000->{1}] Mana for all allies, reducing Heal Rate of all enemies by 30% for 10sec, and every 3sec, strikes a random enemy with lightning, dealing M.DMG [(removed) reducing enemy Mana by 500]. After 10sec, deals M.DMG to all enemies and [dispels positive effects->inflicts Stun for 5 sec].

1.from: Changes Heal Rate Reduction effect to 50% and M.DMG Boost effect to 50%.

2.from: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 500 for the duration of Skill.
2.to: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {1} for the duration of Skill.
2.unified: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [500->{1}] for the duration of Skill.
